_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of the enterprise's cybersecurity safeguards to ensure they provide the intended level of protection.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.545), AG-T-005 (AG, cosine: 0.539).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.495). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise]. DCWF-only terms [cybersecurity, effectiveness, ensure, evaluate, intended, level] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, data, develop, llm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.882, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 19 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (93.7%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of the enterprise's cybersecurity safegua" and "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.581 > STS 0.495 (gap +0.085). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [enterprise] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [enterprise]. DCWF-only: [cybersecurity, effectiveness, ensure, evaluate, intended, level]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, data, develop, llm].
